rationale.R1.2: The passage makes tightly interlinked technical claims (commitment bands, reachability-aware dispatch, coupling mechanism, feasibility guarantees); improving the draft plausibly requires verifying their logical dependence and internal coherence across paragraphs.
rationale.R1.5: 'Improve' commonly implies assessing narrative arc and ordering; the four paragraphs shift focus (conservative LP → combined strategy → rolling re-planning → three-stage pipeline) in a sequence that may warrant restructuring for clearer progression.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is the most natural load-bearing interpretation of 'improve this draft'; sentence-level clarity, concision, and technical register are directly and unambiguously in scope.
